channel.title: GitHub PHP Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of PHP in GitHub

item.title: filamentphp/filament
item.description: A collection of beautiful full-stack components for Laravel. The perfect starting point for your next app. Using Livewire, Alpine.js and Tailwind CSS.

item.title: danielmiessler/SecLists
item.description: SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

item.title: FreshRSS/FreshRSS
item.description: A free, self-hostable news aggregator…

item.title: PrivateBin/PrivateBin
item.description: A minimalist, open source online pastebin where the server has zero knowledge of pasted data. Data is encrypted/decrypted in the browser using 256 bits AES.

item.title: shopware/shopware
item.description: Shopware 6 is an open commerce platform based on Symfony Framework and Vue and supported by a worldwide community and more than 1.500 community extensions

item.title: invoiceninja/invoiceninja
item.description: A source-available invoice, quote, project and time-tracking app built with Laravel

item.title: pterodactyl/panel
item.description: Pterodactyl® is a free, open-source game server management panel built with PHP, React, and Go. Designed with security in mind, Pterodactyl runs all game servers in isolated Docker containers while exposing a beautiful and intuitive UI to end users.

item.title: glpi-project/glpi
item.description: GLPI is a Free Asset and IT Management Software package, Data center management, ITIL Service Desk, licenses tracking and software auditing.

item.title: nextcloud/all-in-one
item.description: 📦 The official Nextcloud installation method. Provides easy deployment and maintenance with most features included in this one Nextcloud instance.

item.title: nikic/PHP-Parser
item.description: A PHP parser written in PHP

item.title: BookStackApp/BookStack
item.description: A platform to create documentation/wiki content built with PHP & Laravel

item.title: v2board/v2board
item.description: 🚀A multiple proxy protocol manage panel application interface

item.title: prasathmani/tinyfilemanager
item.description: Single-file PHP file manager, browser and manage your files efficiently and easily with tinyfilemanager

item.title: opencart/opencart
item.description: A free shopping cart system. OpenCart is an open source PHP-based online e-commerce solution.

item.title: ellite/Wallos
item.description: Wallos: Open-Source Personal Subscription Tracker

item.title: nextcloud/server
item.description: ☁️ Nextcloud server, a safe home for all your data

item.title: MlgmXyysd/Xiaomi-HyperOS-BootLoader-Bypass
item.description: A PoC that exploits a vulnerability to bypass the Xiaomi HyperOS community restrictions of BootLoader unlocked account bindings.

item.title: vitodeploy/vito
item.description: Free and Self-Hosted Server Management Tool

item.title: pmmp/PocketMine-MP
item.description: A server software for Minecraft: Bedrock Edition in PHP

item.title: coollabsio/coolify
item.description: An open-source & self-hostable Heroku / Netlify / Vercel alternative.
